reviews.review_title: I own the full game, check out the demo
reviews.review_description:
I got this a year ago and been impressed following the developers progress on this. This free demo has no time limit so you can try it out to see if throwing a disc in VR is something you enjoy. The maps in the full game are great, especially the beach map, the demo only lets you play one level but it's the full game so if someone with the full game is hosting you can play any map with this, which is great because I have gifted this game several times to my friends when it's been on sale (it's ridiculously cheap in the UK) and now you don't have to! 

I've always considered this game to be my favourite 'hidden gem' - something that deserves way more attention. The developer has worked hard on this, implemented all my feedback and more, one day he just added climbing which was a feature I never knew I needed so badly... now I wish I could climb in walk about minigolf... anyway i recommend checking it out...experience what it's like to throw a frisbee in VR!
